title: Where Billionaires Summer, a Gardener Died in the Snow
description: A landscaper’s difficult life and lonely death reveal the human cost behind the Hamptons’ manicured landscape.
author: Rukmini Callimachi and Victor J. Blue

title: My Town Wants to Build a Homeless Camp. What Can I Do?
description: Knowing a town’s motivation can help residents understand how to engage constructively.
author: Jill Terreri Ramos

title: Pick Your Favorite $1.3 Million Home in Mexico City
description: A colonial-style house in San Ángel, a house in Coyoacán clad in terrazzo, and a 1945 Art Deco-style home in Lomas de Chapultepec. Vote on which one you’d choose.
author: Alison Gregor

title: Homes for Sale in Manhattan and Brooklyn
description: This week’s properties are on the Upper West Side, and in TriBeCa and Bushwick.
author: Heather Senison

title: An Upscale Hotel Breaks Ground in Downtown Newburgh — the First in 133 Years
description: A boutique hotel group known for pioneering tourism in the pastoral Western Catskills has set its sights on one of the Hudson Valley’s most complicated downtowns.
author: Alexandra Marvar and Kate Warren

title: Ohio’s Iconic Basket Building Is for Sale
description: The kitschy building, designed as the Longaberger basket company’s headquarters, has been a roadside attraction in Ohio for almost 30 years.
author: Daniela Gorny

title: Homes for Sale in Connecticut and New York
description: This week’s properties are a three-bedroom in New Canaan, Conn., and a four-bedroom in Cutchogue, N.Y.
author: Alicia Napierkowski and Claudia Gryvatz Copquin

title: For New Home Buyers: Longer Commute Times
description: Entry-level home buyers find deals farther from job hubs, but pay in commute time and at the gas pump.
author: Joyce Cohen

title: Germantown: A Philadelphia Neighborhood Where People Stay
description: Germantown and its neighbor, Mt. Airy, share a rich cultural history, proximity to nature and a strong community.
author: Gina Ryder and Hannah Yoon

title: Pick Your Favorite $1.875 Million Home in Wisconsin, Massachusetts or Washington
description: A converted firehouse in Milwaukee, an 19th-century house in Salem, Mass., and a house with water and mountain views on Bainbridge Island, Wash.
author: Angela Serratore

title: Air Conditioning Quiz: Do You Know How to Keep Your Home Cool?
description: Test your knowledge of how air-conditioning works and how to keep your space (and yourself) cool this season.
author: Daniela Gorny

title: Dakota Johnson Finds a Buyer for Her Los Angeles House
description: The actress is finalizing the sale just days after the home was listed. Chris Evans lowers the price on his house, and Bill Koch is set to auction off his estate.
author: Daniela Gorny

title: An Architect Opts for ‘Optimistic Modernism’ in Her Silver Lake Kitchen
description: Barbara Bestor fills her Los Angeles kitchen and dining room with color and vintage objects with character.
author: Tim McKeough and Philip Cheung

title: Pick Your Favorite $875,000 Home in Montreal
description: A duplex in a converted 1899 mansion, a brick rowhouse from 1922, and a loft with floor-to-ceiling windows in Old Montreal.
author: Michael Kaminer

title: In New Luxury Kitchens, Everything Is Hidden
description: Camouflaging the fridge is just the beginning for high-end kitchens.
author: Leonora Epstein

title: Want to Rent Out Your House? Here’s How to Get Started.
description: Hosting a short-term rental comes with a lot of responsibilities.
author: Jill Terreri Ramos

title: A Home with Old Hollywood Glamour for Sale in the Hollywood Hills
description: Silent film stars Rudolph Valentino and Pola Negri reportedly rendezvoused here in the 1920s.
author: Linda Laban

title: Your Next House May Be a Birdhouse
description: Market data suggests a soaring future for bird watching and for sales of feeding products.
author: Anna Staropoli

title: Homes for Sale in Manhattan and Brooklyn
description: This week’s properties are in Hamilton Heights, Murray Hill and Downtown Brooklyn.
author: Heather Senison

title: Homes for Sale in New York and New Jersey
description: This week’s properties are three-bedroom homes in Freeport, N.Y., and Roseland, N.J.
author: Claudia Gryvatz Copquin and Jill P. Capuzzo
